message:
fix: improve config check error display for missing fields

For missing field errors (like "Missing required field: right"),
don't show "field=" prefix since there's no value to display.
The error message already explains what's missing.

Before: "right=" followed by "Error: Missing required field: right"
After:  "Error: Missing required field: right"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
